evals.name: install-pack-dry-run-then-commit
evals.prompt: Enforce that our workloads set memory limits and run as non-root.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload preflight`, previews `cub-workload guardrails install` (dry-run: shows Triggers, spaces to wire, skips), then on confirmation `guardrails install --commit`. Triggers are Warn=true (advisory), not blocking by default.

evals.name: annotate-pdb-coverage
evals.prompt: Make uncovered multi-replica workloads show a PDB warning.
evals.expected_output: Explains PDB coverage uses annotate-then-validate, runs `cub-workload guardrails annotate` dry-run then --commit --change-desc after install. Read side is workload-availability.

evals.name: status
evals.prompt: Which workloads are currently flagged by the readiness guardrails?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload guardrails status` and reports Units with ApplyWarnings/ApplyGates. Read-only.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Now fix the workloads that got flagged.
evals.expected_output: Routes to workload-harden (single) or workload-fleet (bulk) to remediate, rather than trying to fix from the guardrails skill.
